steps.title: Identify the subject and determine its number
steps.content: The subject is A Sheaf Gleaned in French Fields (1876) — the name of one book. The appositive a volume of English translations of French poems (set off by commas) restates it, confirming it's singular: one work.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: A verb must agree in number with its subject. Has enhanced is the singular present perfect form needed here. The other choices all fail: are enhancing and have enhanced are plural; enhance is bare or plural form. That matches choice A — A is correct.
